headline: Trump declares US-Iran peace deal 'now complete,' as Iran confirms 'immediate end' to the war
description: The initial announcement from mediator Pakistan was quickly confirmed by Washington and Tehran, and an official signing was scheduled for June 19 in Switzerland. Trump said Sunday the Strait of Hormuz, a vital route for global oil and natural gas supplies, would open after the ceremony.

headline: Regulating military AI, a challenge debated in Geneva alongside the G7
Universal basic income, the utopian idea resurging in Silicon Valley
US imposes its domination on part of Latin America
description: Most Latin American countries, even non-aligned ones, have folded to the Trump administration's demands. Washington has not hesitated to use threats of sanctions or visa withdrawals to push its interests, with little regard for the rule of law.

headline: Baudouin, the former king of the Belgians who was willing to do anything to stop abortion
description: Personal diaries and archives shed new light on the ethical and spiritual dilemmas faced by the former monarch in the years before his death, just as Belgium was preparing to legalize abortion.

headline: Is it ever a good idea to... wear a beret?
description: In fashion, as in life, it is important to know the lines you should not cross. Or else, to do so deliberately.

headline: Nicolas Kssis-Martov, sports historian: 'Football has always embodied the political stakes of the left'
description: In his latest book, the journalist delivers an impassioned work centered on key figures and historical moments, rooting football in a progressive vision of hope.

headline: Iran World Cup coach says 'impacted' by politics but ignoring 'hype'

Skydiving plane crash kills 12 in Missouri

Madrid is kicking! Le Monde's picks of restaurants, bars, galleries and boutiques

Raphaël Glucksmann draws crowd at rally and takes aim at far right
Former French PM Fabius sees his art as 'a sharing of emotion'
When Darwin comes to town: How the urban jungle disrupts animals' natural selection
description: Whether it's more aggressive chickadees, snails with lighter coloring or pigeons with anti-pollution plumage, urban wildlife is trying to adapt to city life. Is it behavioral flexibility or true genetic evolution? For the past 10 years, researchers have been investigating.

headline: Marjane Satrapi's comic strips for Le Monde, 20 years ago
description: Best known for her masterpiece 'Persepolis,' the French-Iranian graphic novelist and filmmaker, who died on June 4, published comic strips in issues of Le Monde's magazine.

headline: The Knicks, the soul of New York, are NBA champions after more than half a century of waiting
description: After a long period of anticipation and frustration, New York, where basketball is so much more than just a sport, finally celebrates, following its 94-90 triumph on Saturday in Game 5 of the NBA Finals against Victor Wembanyama's Spurs.

headline: 'While the G7 is indisputably obsolescent, nothing seems capable of replacing it'
'In France, the voice of children remains unheard'
